title: salix × kerneri
intro: Salix × kerneri, also known as Kern's willow, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae) and is a cross between Salix caprea and Salix alba. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which contains salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × kerneri include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions such as arthritis and headaches. In herbal medicine, Salix × kerneri is often prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, and its bark can also be dried and used as a powder for topical applications.
